prompt: A cozy indoor dining/kitchen scene. On a wooden table sits a bright yellow LEGO Technic tracked bulldozer/front loader. The toy has black rubber tracks on grey sprockets, silver pins and joints, a small red warning light on the roof, and black hoses/cables; keep its geometry rigid and consistent. Under it are woven placemats: a blue‑gray mat beneath the bulldozer and a salmon/coral mat in the foreground, showing clear woven texture. In the background are a light wooden chair, a large window with soft natural light from the left, and lush green leafy plants outside/near the window. On the right rear, include a folded black bag and bright red silicone oven mitts/placemat on the table; a white chair is partially visible. Lighting is soft, overcast daylight with gentle reflections on the plastic and subtle shadows on the table; color grading is natural and photorealistic.
